---
title: "bandstop"
generated: true
description: "Zero-phase frequency-domain band-stop (notch): reject `(lo, hi)`."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.signal.filter`](../nitrix-signal-filter.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:bandstop -->
```python
bandstop(X: Num[Array, '... obs'], *, fs: float = 1.0, lo: float, hi: float, ftype: _FilterType = 'maxflat', order: int = 2, transition: Optional[float] = None, axis: int = -1, padding: int = 0) -> Num[Array, '... obs']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:bandstop -->
Zero-phase frequency-domain band-stop (notch): reject `(lo, hi)`.

The complement of [`bandpass`](../nitrix-signal-filter/bandpass.qmd): passes frequencies below `lo` and
above `hi`, attenuating the band between.  Canonical use is notching
a respiratory peak (~0.2-0.4 Hz) out of head-motion estimates before
they are used as nuisance regressors.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:bandstop -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` √ó `obs` | ‚Äî | Signal; the filtered axis is last by default (`axis`). |
| `fs` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1.0` | Sampling frequency in Hz. Pass `fs = 1 / TR` for fMRI. |
| `lo` | `float` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Edges of the *rejected* band in Hz (`0 < lo < hi < fs / 2`). |
| `hi` | `float` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Edges of the *rejected* band in Hz (`0 < lo < hi < fs / 2`). |
| `ftype` | `_FilterType` | ‚Äî | `'maxflat'` | Magnitude-window design: `'maxflat'` (default; the Butterworth magnitude *shape*, applied zero-phase -- a frequency-sampled FIR, not a recursive IIR Butterworth -- see [`iir_filter`](../nitrix-signal-filter/iir_filter.qmd) for that), `'ideal'` (brick wall), or `'cosine'` (raised-cosine edges). |
| `order` | `int` | ‚Äî | `2` | Steepness of the `'maxflat'` roll-off (the exponent of the Butterworth magnitude shape). Ignored for the other designs. Default `2`. |
| `transition` | `Optional[float]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Raised-cosine transition width in Hz (`'cosine'` only); defaults to 10 % of Nyquist. |
| `axis` | `int` | ‚Äî | `-1` | Axis to filter. Default `-1` (trailing time/observation axis). |
| `padding` | `int` | ‚Äî | `0` | Reflect-pad this many samples on each end before filtering, then crop -- reduces the circular-convolution wrap-around at the edges. Default `0` (pure FFT). |

**Returns** `Num` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `obs`. Filtered signal, same shape as `X`. Differentiable through `X`; `fs` / `lo` / `hi` / `order` are static.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:bandstop -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `obs` | *(undocumented ‚Äî add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
